title: WHERE condition ignored after 2 LEFT JOINs with subqueries
poc:
CREATE TABLE emp (
       empno int,
       ename varchar(10),
       job varchar(9),
       mgr int,
       hiredate date,
       sal decimal(7,2),
       comm decimal(7,2),
       deptno int
     );

SELECT e.job, e.ename, ep.ename, epp.ename
       FROM emp e 
      LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM emp) ep ON (e.mgr = ep.empno)
      LEFT JOIN emp epp ON (ep.mgr = epp.empno)
     WHERE e.job = 'SALESMAN'
     ORDER BY 1,2,3,4;
key_bug_features: WHERE condition ignored after multiple LEFT JOINs
bug_features_seed:
SELECT e.ename, d.dname
       FROM emp e
      LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.deptno = d.deptno
     WHERE d.loc = 'DALLAS' OR e.sal > 2000.00
     ORDER BY e.ename;
